baseline.note: Re-baselined after Phase 4.5 on the expanded 8-case held-out set, run on the claude-cli backend (sonnet via the `claude -p` shim). 0.75 is the live debate-gated (un-promoted) agent's baseline MEAN over the four frameworks; tolerance 0.125 absorbs one case of `claude -p` sampling variance (claude -p is not strictly temp-0, confirmed by the tournament determinism recheck). The deterministic oracle ceiling is still 1.0 (see structure-oracle-saturates). The SkillOpt tournament lifted the mean to 0.9688 (best skill staged at evolvers/skillopt/code-review/concurrency/best_skill.md), but that skill is NOT auto-adopted, so this golden gates the live agent.

live.determinism_note: Prompt and scoring are deterministic; the LLM sampling (claude -p subscription) is not strictly temp-0, so per-run rating_band_accuracy varies by ~1 case.

cases.desc: The agent's latest judged rating_band_accuracy (mean over the four frameworks) must be >= baseline (0.75) minus tolerance (0.125) = 0.625.

cases.assert: A perfect-oracle generate (gold-band midpoint + non-empty note) scores rating_band_accuracy=1.0 over all 8 held-out cases.
An empty/blank emission ({}) scores rating_band_accuracy=0.0 (no saturation trap — empty output is never credited).
A non-{rating, notes} object scores 0.0: an extra key, a non-integer/bool/float rating, an out-of-range rating, or empty notes all fail the strict schema.
Across the 8 graded cases the best score any single constant rating can reach is 0.5 (verified by sweeping rating 0..100) — the metric cannot be faked by emitting one fixed number.

The labeled set spans the lens: SAFE (CC-001 guarded RMW, CC-007 pure local fn, CC-008 check-then-act under lock; [85,100]); UNSAFE lost-update (CC-002 lock-free increment, CC-006 RMW across await; [0,45]); SERIOUS (CC-003 AB-BA deadlock; [0,30]); and middle-band problems (CC-004 check-then-act no lock [25,55], CC-005 lock held across blocking call [45,70]).
The subagent .md body (front-matter stripped) is byte-identical to concurrencylens_prompt.APPROVED_PROMPT, so all four frameworks run the same debate-gated lines.
